title: MyceliumFractalNet: Morphogenetic Field Intelligence Engine with Identity Preservation
description: Bio-inspired morphogenetic field intelligence engine combining reaction-diffusion PDE simulation, persistent homology (TDA), causal validation (46 rules), neuromodulatory control (GNC+ 7 axes), interpretability engine, self-reading architecture, and tau-control identity preservation. First system to unify R-D + TDA + causal + neuromod + self-healing in a single Python package. 2798 tests, 20 modules, ~60K LOC.
